summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a good coverage of attribute values, but there are instances of near-duplicate phrasings and some overrepresented modes. The diversity could be improved by incorporating more edge cases and varying the phrasing styles.
recommendations: Encourage the generation of more diverse phrasing styles to reduce near-duplicates.
Include more edge cases and rare scenarios to enhance the diversity of the samples.
Vary the difficulty levels more evenly across intents to avoid overrepresentation.
